name: Gum-Gum Cuatro Jet Cross Shock Bazooka

issues.description: Missing required condition: 'you have 2 or more rested Characters' is not represented. Current condition only checks LeaderHasType ODYSSEY.
Extraneous effect detected: second trigger with KO action has no basis in card text. Card only describes one effect (power boost). This entire effect should be removed.

Target scope incorrect: 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' allows selection of any owned character/leader, but text specifies 'up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards' — should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' with maxTargets:1 constraint explicitly applied.
